name: EdwBhiMbrBaseTableLoad_delta

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE_BASE AS ( SELECT mbrEnr.PROD_ID, mbrEnr.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, mbr.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY, mbr.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK, COALESCE(mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5,' ') AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, CASE WHEN (mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD) IN('AK','AL','AR','AZ','CA','CO','CT','DC','DE','FL','GA','HI','IA','ID','IL','IN','KS','KY','LA','MA','MD','ME','MI','MN','MO','MS','MT','NC','ND','NE','NH','NJ','NM','NV','NY','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VA','VT','WA','WI','WV','WY') THEN 'US' WHEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD IN('NA','UNK','AA','AE','AP') THEN 'UN' ELSE mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD END AS NATION, CASE WHEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD IN('AK','AL','AR','AZ','CA','CO','CT','DC','DE','FL','GA','HI','IA','ID','IL','IN','KS','KY','LA','MA','MD','ME','MI','MN','MO','MS','MT','NC','ND','NE','NH','NJ','NM','NV','NY','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VA','VT','WA','WI','WV','WY') THEN ( SELECT CASE WHEN fips.CNTY_FIPS_NO IS NOT NULL THEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD + fips.CNTY_FIPS_NO ELSE '     ' END FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.FIPS_D fips WHERE fips.ST_CD = mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD AND fips.CNTY_NM = mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_CNTY_NM ) ELSE '     ' END AS COUNTY, mbr.MBR_GNDR_CD, grp.PRNT_GRP_ID, mbrEnr.GRP_ID, mbrEnr.SUBGRP_ID, mbr.MBR_RELSHP_CD, mbr2.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY_2, mbrEnr.CLS_ID, prd.PROD_MNTL_HLTH_COV_IN, prd.PROD_DRUG_COV_IN, prd.PROD_HLTH_COV_IN, prd.PROD_SH_NM_DLVRY_METH_CD, prd.PROD_ABBR, mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK, mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK, prd.PROD_SH_NM, mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD, mbrEnr.PROD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ENR_D mbrEnr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D grp, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROD_D prd, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr2, ( SELECT DISTINCT mbrEnr.MBR_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ENR_D mbrEnr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D grp WHERE mbrEnr.MBR_SK = mbr.MBR_SK AND mbrEnr.GRP_SK = grp.GRP_SK AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = 'MED' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.StartDate}' AND mbrEnr.PROD_SH_NM IN ('PCB','PC','BCARE','BLUE-ACCESS','BLUE-SELECT','BLUESELECT+','HP','BMADVH','BMADVP') AND mbrEnr.CLS_ID <> 'MHIP' AND mbrEnr.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10023000','10024000') AND grp.PRNT_GRP_ID <> '650600000' AND mbrEnr.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunCycBegin}' AND mbrEnr.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunCycEnd}' UNION SELECT DISTINCT mbrCob.MBR_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ENR_D mbrEnr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_COB_D mbrCob, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D grp WHERE mbrEnr.MBR_SK = mbr.MBR_SK AND mbrEnr.GRP_SK = grp.GRP_SK AND mbrEnr.MBR_SK = mbrCob.MBR_SK AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = 'MED' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.StartDate}' AND mbrEnr.PROD_SH_NM IN ('PCB','PC','BCARE','BLUE-ACCESS','BLUE-SELECT','BLUESELECT+','HP','BMADVH','BMADVP') AND mbrEnr.CLS_ID <> 'MHIP' AND mbrEnr.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10023000','10024000') AND grp.PRNT_GRP_ID <> '650600000' AND mbrCob.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.StartDate}' AND mbrCob.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunCycBegin}' AND mbrCob.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK <= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunCycEnd}' ) A WHERE mbrEnr.MBR_SK = mbr.MBR_SK AND mbrEnr.MBR_SK = A.MBR_SK AND mbr.SUB_MBR_SK = mbr2.MBR_SK AND mbrEnr.GRP_SK = grp.GRP_SK AND mbrEnr.PROD_SK = prd.PROD_SK AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = 'MED' AND mbrEnr.PROD_SH_NM IN ('PCB','PC','BCARE','BLUE-ACCESS','BLUE-SELECT','BLUESELECT+','HP','BMADVH','BMADVP') AND mbrEnr.CLS_ID <> 'MHIP' AND mbrEnr.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10023000','10024000') AND grp.PRNT_GRP_ID <> '650600000' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.StartDate}' ), CTE_TRANSFORM AS ( SELECT '240' AS BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, (CTE_BASE.PROD_ID + REPLICATE(' ',15 - LEN(CTE_BASE.PROD_ID))) AS HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, (CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY + REPLICATE(' ',22 - LEN(CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY))) AS MBR_ID, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY=0 THEN (CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY + REPLICATE(' ',22 - LEN(CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY))) ELSE CAST(CTE_BASE.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY AS VARCHAR(22)) END AS CONSIS_MBR_ID, 'FCTS ' AS TRACEABILITY_FLD, CASE WHEN LEN(CTE_BASE.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK)=0 OR CTE_BASE.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK='NA' OR CTE_BASE.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK='UNK' THEN REPLICATE(' ',8) ELSE REPLACE(CTE_BASE.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK,'-','') END AS MBR_DOB, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 IS NULL THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN dbo.trim_default(CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5)='' THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN dbo.trim_default(CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5)='00000' THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN dbo.trim_default(CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5)='99999' THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN ISNUMERIC(dbo.trim_default(CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5))=1 AND CAST(dbo.trim_default(CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5) AS INT)=0 THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) ELSE CTE_BASE.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 END AS MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.NATION='US' THEN 'US' WHEN CTE_BASE.NATION IS NULL THEN 'UN' ELSE CTE_BASE.NATION END AS MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.COUNTY IS NULL THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) ELSE CTE_BASE.COUNTY END AS MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, CASE WHEN LEN(CTE_BASE.MBR_GNDR_CD)=0 OR CTE_BASE.MBR_GNDR_CD IN('NA','UNK','UNKGNDR') THEN 'U' ELSE CTE_BASE.MBR_GNDR_CD END AS MBR_GNDR, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.GRP_ID='10025000' THEN 'BLU' ELSE 'NON' END AS MBR_CONFITY_CD, (CTE_BASE.PRNT_GRP_ID + REPLICATE(' ',14 - LEN(CTE_BASE.PRNT_GRP_ID))) AS ACCT, (CTE_BASE.GRP_ID + REPLICATE(' ',14 - LEN(CTE_BASE.GRP_ID))) AS GRP_ID, (CTE_BASE.SUBGRP_ID + REPLICATE(' ',10 - LEN(CTE_BASE.SUBGRP_ID))) AS SUBGRP_ID, dbo.trim_custom(CTE_BASE.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK,'-','A') AS COV_BEG_DT, dbo.trim_custom(CTE_BASE.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK,'-','A') AS COV_END_DT, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.MBR_RELSHP_CD='SUB' THEN '18' WHEN CTE_BASE.MBR_RELSHP_CD='SPOUSE' THEN '01' WHEN CTE_BASE.MBR_RELSHP_CD='DPNDT' THEN '19' ELSE 'G8' END AS MBR_RELSHP, (CTE_BASE.PROD_ID + REPLICATE(' ',15 - LEN(CTE_BASE.PROD_ID))) AS HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, (CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY_2 + REPLICATE(' ',22 - LEN(CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY_2))) AS SUB_ID, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.GRP_ID IN('10000000','10001000','10003000') THEN 'ACT' WHEN LEFT(CTE_BASE.CLS_ID,1)='R' THEN 'RET' WHEN LEFT(CTE_BASE.CLS_ID,1)='C' THEN 'COB' ELSE 'ACT' END AS ENR_ELIG_STTUS, 'X' AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, 'X' AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, 'X' AS DEDCT_CAT, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.PROD_MNTL_HLTH_COV_IN='Y' THEN 'B ' ELSE 'N ' END AS MHCD_ENR_BNF, CTE_BASE.PROD_DRUG_COV_IN AS PDX_BNF_IN, CTE_BASE.PROD_MNTL_HLTH_COV_IN AS MHCD_BNF_IN, CTE_BASE.PROD_HLTH_COV_IN AS MED_BNF_IN, CTE_BASE.PROD_HLTH_COV_IN AS HOSP_BNF_IN, CTE_BASE.PROD_SH_NM_DLVRY_METH_CD AS BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, CTE_BASE.PROD_SH_NM_DLVRY_METH_CD AS BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, CTE_BASE.PROD_ABBR AS PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, CTE_BASE.PROD_ABBR AS PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, CASE WHEN CTE_BASE.PROD_DRUG_COV_IN='Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'X' END AS PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, 'XX' AS PDX_BNF_TIERS, CTE_BASE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CTE_BASE.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK, CTE_BASE.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK, CTE_BASE.PROD_SK, CTE_BASE.PROD_SH_NM FROM CTE_BASE ) SELECT * FROM CTE_TRANSFORM

JOB NAME:  EdwBhiMbrBaseTableLoad


DESCRIPTION:  Extract member data to be sent to BCBSA for BHI (Blue Health Intelligence)


CALLED BY:  EdwBhiMemExtrSeq

HASH FILES:  


RERUN INFORMATION: 

             PREVIOUS RUN SUCCESSFUL:   Nothing to reset. 
             PREVIOUS RUN ABORTED:         Nothing to reset, just restart.

BHI Member Extract 
Initial file: 2010-01-01 to 2012-12-31

Writes to a common control totals file
Extract & code all fields except those related to COB
Create dataset for further processing
